seo.title: AI Content Strategy implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping AI Content Strategy projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for launching and scaling an AI-assisted content strategy. It focuses on maintaining technical accuracy, SEO integrity, and operational efficiency while leveraging LLMs for content production.

items.title: Keyword Difficulty and Intent Validation
items.description: Cross-reference target keywords in Ahrefs or SEMrush to ensure intent matches the proposed format (e.g., tutorial vs. listicle) and difficulty is within reachable domain authority limits.

items.title: Topical Cluster Mapping
items.description: Map every planned piece of content to a specific pillar page or topic cluster to ensure logical internal linking and topical authority building.

items.title: Funnel Stage Assignment
items.description: Explicitly label each content item as TOFU, MOFU, or BOFU to dictate the technical depth and call-to-action (CTA) strategy.

items.title: Competitor Gap Analysis
items.description: Identify specific technical details or use cases missing from top-ranking SERP results that your content must address to provide unique value.

items.title: Monetization Path Definition
items.description: Identify which specific product feature or service offering each content piece is intended to promote or support.

items.title: System Prompt Standardization
items.description: Define and document system prompts for OpenAI/Anthropic that specify persona, technical constraints, and prohibited jargon to maintain voice consistency.

items.title: Human-in-the-loop (HITL) Checkpoints
items.description: Integrate mandatory manual review stages in the workflow for outline approval, technical verification, and final polish.

items.title: Data Grounding Protocols
items.description: Ensure prompts include specific source documentation, API references, or internal data to prevent LLM hallucinations.

items.title: Multi-Step Generation Workflow
items.description: Break content generation into discrete steps: outline, research, drafting, and formatting, rather than single-prompt full-article generation.

items.title: AI Detection and Plagiarism Scans
items.description: Run output through tools like Originality.ai or Copyscape to ensure content is sufficiently transformed and unique.

items.title: Code Snippet Execution
items.description: Manually execute every code block generated by AI in a local environment to verify syntax and functionality.

items.title: API and Library Version Verification
items.description: Cross-check all referenced library versions and API endpoints against current official documentation to ensure they are not deprecated.

items.title: Technical Fact-Checking
items.description: Verify all claims regarding performance benchmarks, architectural patterns, or security protocols against primary sources.

items.title: Glossary Adherence
items.description: Check content against a defined technical glossary to ensure consistent usage of industry terms and brand-specific nomenclature.

items.title: Visual Asset Accuracy
items.description: Review AI-generated diagrams or screenshots for technical correctness and clear labeling of components.

items.title: Semantic SEO Optimization
items.description: Use Clearscope or SurferSEO to ensure the content includes relevant LSI keywords and covers all subtopics required by search engines.

items.title: Internal Link Injection
items.description: Insert at least 3-5 links to other relevant technical posts or product pages using descriptive anchor text.

items.title: Schema Markup Implementation
items.description: Apply Article, FAQ, or CodeSnippet schema to the HTML to improve search engine understanding and rich result eligibility.

items.title: Metadata Optimization
items.description: Verify that meta titles and descriptions are within character limits and include the primary target keyword.

items.title: OpenGraph and Social Preview Audit
items.description: Test social sharing cards to ensure images and titles render correctly for developer platforms like Twitter and LinkedIn.

items.title: GA4 Event Configuration
items.description: Set up custom events in Google Analytics 4 to track specific interactions like code snippet copies or documentation click-throughs.

items.title: Search Console Baseline
items.description: Record baseline rankings and impressions in Google Search Console immediately after indexing to track growth.

items.title: Conversion Attribution Setup
items.description: Ensure UTM parameters and lead tracking are correctly configured to measure content's impact on the sales pipeline.

items.title: Content Refresh Schedule
items.description: Add the content piece to a maintenance calendar for a technical review every 6 months to prevent decay.

items.title: Feedback Loop Integration
items.description: Establish a process to feed performance data back into the AI prompting strategy to refine future outputs.
